{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/2634-260418-095432/plan.md","content":"# Plan: Add auth middleware to protect existing API routes

## Context

The `withAuth` HOC (`src/auth/withAuth.ts`) already exists and is used by most routes, but two routes are missing it and several handlers have redundant auth checks that are already done by `withAuth`. This task applies `withAuth` consistently to all routes under the five named directories and removes duplicate auth checks.

## Scope

The task explicitly covers: `src/app/api/notes`, `src/app/api/quizzes`, `src/app/api/courses`, `src/app/api/enroll`, `src/app/api/gradebook`. Other routes (`notifications`, `dashboard`, `health`, `csrf-token`) are out of scope.

## What needs to change

### 1. `src/app/api/courses/search/route.ts` — Missing `{ optional: true }`
The GET already uses `withAuth` but doesn't pass `{ optional: true }`, so unauthenticated requests currently get 401 instead of… [+2827 chars]

The plan is written and ready for review. Here's a summary of what I found:

**The `withAuth` HOC already exists** and is already applied to most routes — only **2 routes are missing it**:

1. **`src/app/api/courses/search/route.ts`** — GET uses `withAuth` but without `{ optional: true }`, so unauthenticated requests incorrectly get 401
2. **`src/app/api/quizzes/[id]/attempts/route.ts`** — GET has no auth at all, despite accessing `user.id`

**Additionally**, 6 handlers have redundant `if (!user… [+230 chars]
